$comment: MediaSuite listing for the Anthropic (Claude) Connectors Directory 11-step portal. Same schema as anthropic.config.json (NotesBridge). Requires a Team/Enterprise Claude org with Owner access. Reviewer creds + seeding are PENDING the demo account (see media-suite/CONNECTOR-PLAN.md gap 3).

connection.connectionModelNote: One MCP URL for all users; each user authenticates via OAuth 2.1 to their own MediaSuite workspace (per-user token isolation, server-enforced).

listing.tagline: Plan, schedule & analyze your social content
listing.description: MediaSuite connects Claude to your creator content workspace — your media library, AI-scored clips, scheduled posts, and cross-platform analytics. Ask what's performing and why, plan a week of short-form posts from one long video, draft and schedule posts across YouTube/Instagram/TikTok/Threads/Pinterest/Bluesky, tailor per-platform captions, generate a media kit or performance brief, search across your transcripts by meaning, and trace which posts drove real revenue. Everything is grounded in your own data (event-sourced in your MediaSuite workspace) — the connector reads and writes only your content, authenticated per-user via OAuth 2.1 with PKCE and Dynamic Client Registration. Publishing goes direct to each platform via your connected accounts; no third-party reposting service. Read tools are read-only; the few write tools (draft, schedule, capture idea, export) are additive and confirmed by you.

primary: Answer 'what's performing?' — top posts, per-format/topic analytics, views trend over time
Plan a week of shorts from one long-form video across your best posting windows
Draft and schedule posts with per-platform caption variants
Generate a media kit (sponsor one-pager) or a performance brief
Search your spoken content (transcripts) by meaning; trace revenue back to posts
useCases.prerequisites: A MediaSuite workspace with the user's own media + connected social accounts. Reviewers use the demo workspace (seeded, no setup) — PENDING.
useCases.readWrite: Read and write. 16 read-only tools (library, clips, stats, analytics, accounts, transcripts, attribution, ideas). 5 additive write tools: draft_post, schedule_post, generate_brief, add_idea, export_data (only export_data reaches an external destination).

company.name: DUPREE OPS LLC
company.primaryContactNote: Primary contact email for review updates; not stored here.

authentication.detail: OAuth 2.1 + PKCE (S256) + RFC 7591 Dynamic Client Registration. Discovery at /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server and /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/v1/mcp. Rotating refresh tokens.

dataHandling.firstPartyApiNote: MediaSuite operates its own gateway + Supabase workspace; publishing uses the user's own connected platform accounts (direct platform APIs), not a third-party reposting service.
dataHandling.conversationDataCollection: none — the connector reads/writes only the user's own MediaSuite data; no conversation data is retained by the connector.

reviewerTest.note: Add MediaSuite as a custom connector and authorize via OAuth; on the connector's own consent page enter handle 'demo' and the mcp_ token. The demo user reads an ISOLATED seeded namespace (sample media, clips, published posts + stats-over-time, accounts, ideas) — no real user data is exposed. Verified end-to-end against the live server 2026-07-18 (npm run seed:demo provisions it).
reviewerTest.tokenLocation: media-suite/.env.local (gitignored) — paste the token value into the portal at submission time
prompts: How have my views trended over the last month?
Plan a week of shorts from media dm1
Add a content idea: repurpose the podcast into a carousel

compliance.note: Seven mandatory acknowledgments + Anthropic Software Directory Terms & Policy — the OWNER's legal attestations; automation stops before them.
acknowledgments: Financial transactions (none initiated by the connector)
AI media generation (clip/caption generation over the user's own media)
